common.action: Swig Ya Drink: Swig ya drink, gangsta. And consider yourself lucky.
Triple Threat: Take 3 sips of ya drink

uncommon.action: Commence Suckdown: Take 5 sips of ya drink
Banshee: Run outside and scream as loud as you can.

rare.action: Mudslide: Roll around on the floor and oink like a pig
All Angles: The people immediately to your left and right are going to punch you. Now! Get him!

legendary.action: The Tummy Rumbler: Back to back double shotgun

common.action: Double Duty: Make one person drink twice

uncommon.action: Throat Force Action Move: Make one person take a handle sucker.

rare.action: Fief Lord: Take anyone's drink and call them a good boy for handing it over.
Super Tane Ability Version Four: Make anyone named Tane pull handle. Unless you're Tane - in that case EVERYONE ELSE pulls handle. If no one's named Tane you're playing the game wrong.

legendary.action: Slaughter: Make another player take a big 'effin swig from the handle. And I DO mean big.
Exempt Status: Everyone but you finishes their drink.
